name: Karvonen Heart Rate Calculator
description: Calculate target heart rate using Karvonen formula.
seo_description: Use our free karvonen heart rate calculator to quickly estimate target_hr based on age, rest_hr, intensity. No registration needed.
example_label: Calculate target HR: 30 years, 60 bpm resting, 70% intensity.
result_context: The frequency target Use formula Karvonen que considera frequency in reposo to greater precisión.
formula_display: FC target = FC reposo + ((220 - edad) - FC reposo) × intensity%
steps: The calculador aplica The formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: No Verify que age estén in units correctas antes of Calculate
Redondear values intermedios antes of the calculation final (pierde precisión)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condiciones especiales
desc: Free online karvonen heart rate calculator. Enter age and resting hr to get instant results.
